SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.api

Class TlsScanner

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.api.TlsScanner
public final class TlsScanner extends Object
TLS scanner with configurable threading, per-host rate limiting, per-host results, and a global monitor for UI integration.

Uses Java 21 virtual threads with a semaphore to cap concurrency.

Author:
Milton Smith

  • Method Details

    • scan

      public static List<IScanResult> scan(Collection<String> targets) throws DeepVioletException
      Scan with target spec strings using default configuration.
      Parameters:
      targets - target specification strings (hostname, IP, CIDR, ranges)
      Returns:
      per-host results
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - on parsing or scan errors

    • scan

      public static List<IScanResult> scan(Collection<String> targets, ScanConfig config) throws DeepVioletException
      Scan with target spec strings and custom configuration.
      Parameters:
      targets - target specification strings
      config - scan configuration
      Returns:
      per-host results
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - on parsing or scan errors

    • scan

      public static List<IScanResult> scan(Collection<String> targets, ScanConfig config, IScanListener listener) throws DeepVioletException
      Scan with target spec strings, custom configuration, and a listener.
      Parameters:
      targets - target specification strings
      config - scan configuration
      listener - event listener, or null
      Returns:
      per-host results
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - on parsing or scan errors

    • scan

      public static List<IScanResult> scan(List<URL> urls, ScanConfig config, IScanListener listener) throws DeepVioletException
      Scan with pre-parsed URLs.
      Parameters:
      urls - list of target URLs
      config - scan configuration
      listener - event listener, or null
      Returns:
      per-host results in the same order as the input
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - on scan errors

    • scanAsync

      public static CompletableFuture<List<IScanResult>> scanAsync(Collection<String> targets, ScanConfig config, IScanListener listener) throws DeepVioletException
      Async variant returning CompletableFuture.
      Parameters:
      targets - target specification strings
      config - scan configuration
      listener - event listener, or null
      Returns:
      future that completes with per-host results
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - on target parsing errors

    • getMonitor

      public static IScanMonitor getMonitor()
      Get the monitor for polling thread/progress status during an active scan.
      Returns:
      the global scan monitor
